description: Daily journaling system with rich text editor, file uploads, checklists, and trade integration

userStories.title: Add ID generators for daily journal entities
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ID generators for daily journal, checklist template, and journal attachment entities so that they have consistent prefixed IDs.
acceptanceCriteria: dailyJournal ID generator added to src/lib/shared/id.ts with prefix 'dj'
checklistTemplate ID generator added with prefix 'ct'
journalAttachment ID generator added with prefix 'ja'
userStories.notes: Added dailyJournal, checklistTemplate, journalAttachment ID generators with prefixes dj, ct, ja

userStories.title: Add daily journals schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database schema for daily journals so that journal content can be stored per user per date.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id, userId, date, content, contentFormat, createdAt, updatedAt
Foreign key references users table with cascade delete
Unique index on userId + date combination
Index on userId for efficient queries
Uses ids.dailyJournal() for primary key default
userStories.notes: Added dailyJournals table with all required fields, FK to users, unique index on userId+date, index on userId, uses ids.dailyJournal()

userStories.title: Add checklist templates schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database schema for checklist templates so that users can define reusable checklist items.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id, userId, text, order, isActive, createdAt
Foreign key references users table with cascade delete
Uses ids.checklistTemplate() for primary key default
userStories.notes: Added dailyChecklistTemplates table with all fields, FK to users with cascade delete, index on userId, uses ids.checklistTemplate()

userStories.title: Add checklist checks schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database schema for daily checklist checks so that users can track which items they completed each day.
acceptanceCriteria: Composite primary key on journalId + templateId
Foreign keys reference dailyJournals and dailyChecklistTemplates with cascade delete
userStories.notes: Added dailyChecklistChecks table with composite PK on journalId+templateId, FKs to dailyJournals and dailyChecklistTemplates with cascade delete, index on journalId

userStories.title: Add journal attachments schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a database schema for journal attachments so that files uploaded to journals can be tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: id, journalId, url, key, filename, mimeType, size, caption, createdAt
Foreign key references dailyJournals with cascade delete
Uses ids.journalAttachment() for primary key default
userStories.notes: Added journalAttachments table with all fields, FK to dailyJournals with cascade delete, index on journalId, uses ids.journalAttachment()

userStories.title: Run db:push for daily journal tables
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to push schema changes to the database so that the new tables are available.
acceptanceCriteria: All four new tables exist in database
userStories.notes: db:push completed successfully, created dailyJournals, dailyChecklistTemplates, dailyChecklistChecks, journalAttachments tables. Also fixed biome config to exclude example files.

userStories.title: Create dailyJournal router with getByDate
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want a getByDate query so that I can fetch or auto-create a journal for a specific date.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-creates journal if not exists for user+date
userStories.notes: Created dailyJournal router with getByDate query that auto-creates journals. Normalizes dates to midnight UTC. Returns journal with attachments and checklist checks.

userStories.title: Add updateContent mutation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to save my journal content so that my notes are persisted.
userStories.notes: Added updateContent mutation with upsert logic. Normalizes date to midnight UTC, finds existing or creates new journal with content.

userStories.title: Add getRange query
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want to fetch journals for a date range so that I can display them on a calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns journals between dates for current user
Includes content presence indicator for calendar display
userStories.notes: Added getRange query with date filtering using gte/lte. Returns hasContent indicator for calendar display.

userStories.title: Add getWithTrades query
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my journal alongside trades for a date so that I can review the full context.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns journal and trades for that date
Trades filtered by entry time within the date
userStories.notes: Added getWithTrades query that auto-creates journal and fetches trades by entry time within the date. Uses lt(entryTime, nextDay) for proper date boundary filtering. Returns journal with attachments/checks and trades with account/tags.

userStories.title: Add checklist template CRUD operations
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to manage my checklist templates so that I can customize my daily routine.
acceptanceCriteria: getTemplates query returns user's templates ordered by order field
createTemplate mutation creates new template with text and order
updateTemplate mutation updates text, order, or isActive
userStories.notes: Added getTemplates query (ordered by order field), createTemplate mutation (auto-calculates next order if not provided), updateTemplate mutation (text/order/isActive), deleteTemplate mutation. All use protectedProcedure with user ownership validation.

userStories.title: Add reorderTemplates mutation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to reorder my checklist templates so that I can prioritize important items.
userStories.notes: Added reorderTemplates mutation that accepts items array with id/order, validates user ownership, uses db transaction for bulk update, returns updated templates ordered by order field.

userStories.title: Add daily check operations
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to check off items on my daily checklist so that I can track my routine adherence.
acceptanceCriteria: getChecks query returns checks for a date (auto-creates journal if needed)
toggleCheck mutation toggles a check for journal+template
bulkUpdateChecks mutation updates multiple checks at once
Check records created on first toggle
userStories.notes: Added getChecks query (auto-creates journal), toggleCheck mutation (creates check record on first toggle, toggles existing), bulkUpdateChecks mutation (upserts multiple checks in transaction). All validate template ownership.

userStories.title: Integration tests for dailyJournal router core operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for journal CRUD operations to verify correct behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests user isolation (cannot access other user's journals)
userStories.notes: Created tests/integration/daily-journal/journal.test.ts with 15 tests covering getByDate auto-creation, updateContent persistence, getRange date filtering, hasContent indicator, and user isolation. All tests pass.

userStories.title: Integration tests for checklist operations
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for checklist template and check operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests check toggle and bulk update
userStories.notes: Created tests/integration/daily-journal/checklist.test.ts with 19 tests covering template CRUD, reorderTemplates, toggleCheck, bulkUpdateChecks, auto-journal creation, and user ownership validation. All tests pass.

userStories.title: Set up S3 client utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an S3 client configured for Bun so that I can interact with object storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Configured via environment variables (S3_ENDPOINT, S3_REGION, S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID, S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, S3_BUCKET)
Environment variables added to src/env.js schema
userStories.notes: Created src/lib/storage/s3.ts with Bun S3Client, lazy initialization, presigned URL helpers, delete/exists functions. Added optional S3_* env vars to src/env.js schema.

userStories.title: Add getUploadUrl mutation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to get a presigned URL so that I can upload files directly to S3.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts filename, mimeType, size, and date parameters
userStories.notes: Added getUploadUrl mutation using nanoid for unique keys, presigned PUT URL via getPresignedUploadUrl, checks isS3Configured before proceeding.

userStories.title: Add confirmUpload mutation
userStories.description: As a frontend, I want to confirm an upload completed so that the attachment is recorded in the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Accepts journalId, key, filename, mimeType, size, caption
userStories.notes: Added confirmUpload mutation that validates journal ownership, generates presigned download URL (7-day expiry), creates journalAttachments record with all fields.

userStories.title: Add deleteAttachment mutation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to delete attachments so that I can remove unwanted files.
acceptanceCriteria: Deletes from S3 using stored key
userStories.notes: Added deleteAttachment mutation that validates user owns attachment via journal ownership, deletes from S3 (with graceful error handling), and deletes database record.

userStories.title: Install and configure Tiptap dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Tiptap installed so that I can build a rich text editor.
userStories.notes: Installed @tiptap/react, @tiptap/pm, @tiptap/starter-kit, @tiptap/extension-link, @tiptap/extension-image, @tiptap/extension-placeholder v3.15.3

userStories.title: Create daily-journal page layout
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a daily journal page with resizable panels so that I can view calendar and editor side by side.
acceptanceCriteria: Left panel (30%) for calendar and checklist
Right panel (70%) for editor and attachments
userStories.notes: Created page with ResizablePanelGroup, left panel (30%) for calendar/checklist, right panel (70%) for editor/attachments. Uses useState for date management. Panel sizes persist to localStorage.

userStories.title: Create DateNavigation component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want date navigation controls so that I can move between days and select dates.
acceptanceCriteria: Today button to jump to current date
Date picker integration using existing Calendar component
userStories.notes: Created DateNavigation component with prev/next buttons, Today button, and date picker popover using react-day-picker. Added Calendar and Popover UI components.

userStories.title: Create CalendarSidebar component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a calendar view with P&L colors so that I can see my trading performance at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Days colored by P&L (green for profit, red for loss)
Journal indicator dot for days with content
userStories.notes: Created CalendarSidebar with month grid, P&L colors using analytics.getCalendarData, journal indicators using dailyJournal.getRange. Uses stable keys for weeks, date-fns for date manipulation, tooltips for day details.

userStories.title: Add Daily Journal to sidebar navigation
userStories.description: As a trader, I want Daily Journal in the nav so that I can easily access it.
userStories.notes: Added Daily Journal nav item to mainNavItems array with Calendar icon, positioned after Trades.

userStories.title: Create DailyChecklist component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see and interact with my daily checklist so that I can track my routine.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetches templates and checks for selected date
Displays checkboxes for each active template
Toggle updates check status with optimistic update
Settings gear icon to open template management
userStories.notes: Created DailyChecklist component with optimistic updates for toggle, compliance percentage display with progress bar, settings gear icon, loading/empty states. Uses getTemplates and getChecks queries with toggleCheck mutation.

userStories.title: Create ChecklistSettings modal
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to manage my checklist templates so that I can customize my routine.
acceptanceCriteria: Add new template item with text input
userStories.notes: Created ChecklistSettings modal with add/edit/delete templates, up/down reorder buttons, toggle active/inactive, delete confirmation, optimistic updates.

userStories.title: Create EditorToolbar component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a toolbar with formatting options so that I can style my journal content.
acceptanceCriteria: Bullet list and ordered list buttons
Buttons show active state when format is applied
userStories.notes: Created EditorToolbar component with bold, italic, strikethrough, H1/H2/H3, bullet/ordered lists, link popover, and image upload button. Used custom EditorCommands interface to handle Tiptap extension command types.

userStories.title: Create JournalEditor component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a rich text editor so that I can write formatted journal entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Tiptap editor with StarterKit, Link, Image, Placeholder extensions
userStories.notes: Created JournalEditor component with Tiptap, StarterKit/Link/Image/Placeholder extensions, 500ms debounced auto-save, save status indicator (saving/saved/error), image upload integration, date change handling.

userStories.title: Add markdown shortcuts to editor
userStories.description: As a trader, I want markdown shortcuts so that I can quickly format text without the toolbar.
acceptanceCriteria: # for H1, ## for H2, ### for H3
userStories.notes: Verified: StarterKit includes all markdown shortcuts by default - # for headings, **bold**, *italic*, - for bullets, 1. for ordered lists, > for blockquotes. No code changes needed.

userStories.title: Create AttachmentUpload component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to upload files to my journal so that I can attach screenshots and documents.
userStories.notes: Created AttachmentUpload component with drag-drop, progress tracking via XMLHttpRequest, file validation, and S3 upload flow. Integrated into daily-journal page.

userStories.title: Create AttachmentGallery component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to view and manage my journal attachments so that I can see uploaded files.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows filename and file type icon for non-images
userStories.notes: Created AttachmentGallery with image grid, lightbox, delete confirmation, and file list with icons. Integrated into daily-journal page.

userStories.title: Integrate image upload into editor
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to paste or drop images into the editor so that they appear inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Paste image from clipboard inserts into editor
Drop image onto editor inserts inline
Image URL inserted at cursor position
userStories.notes: Added paste/drop handlers to JournalEditor. Images auto-upload to S3 and insert at cursor position.

userStories.title: Create TradesSummary component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see trades for the selected date so that I can review them alongside my journal.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows symbol, direction, P&L for each trade
userStories.notes: Created TradesSummary with trade list, direction icons, P&L display, win/loss stats, and total P&L. Integrated into left panel.

userStories.title: Create DailyJournalPreview component
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a compact journal preview so that I can see journal content in the trade detail tab.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows journal content for given date
userStories.notes: Created DailyJournalPreview component with Tiptap editor, checklist compliance badge from templates+checks, link to full journal, and read-only/editable modes with auto-save.

userStories.title: Integrate DailyJournalPreview into trade detail
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see and edit my daily journal from the trade detail view so that context is readily available.
userStories.notes: Integrated DailyJournalPreview into content-panel.tsx. Replaced placeholder with component using trade.entryTime for date, editable mode enabled.

userStories.title: Add getStreak query
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my journaling streak so that I stay motivated to journal daily.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculates consecutive days with journal content
userStories.notes: Added getStreak query that fetches all user journals, filters to those with content, creates Set for O(1) lookup, counts consecutive days backwards from today.

userStories.title: Add getComplianceStats query
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my checklist compliance over time so that I can track my routine adherence.
userStories.notes: Added getComplianceStats query that accepts startDate/endDate, fetches active templates and journals with checks in range, calculates compliance % per day (checkedCount/totalTemplates), returns dailyCompliance array and averageCompliance.

userStories.title: Add streak and compliance UI
userStories.description: As a trader, I want to see my streak and compliance stats in the calendar sidebar.
acceptanceCriteria: Visual indicator (fire icon or similar for streak)
userStories.notes: Added streak display with FlameIcon (orange when > 0), compliance % with CheckCircle2Icon (color-coded by threshold). Both have tooltips with detailed info.

userStories.title: Create barrel export for daily-journal components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a barrel export for daily journal components so that imports are cleaner.
userStories.notes: Created barrel export index.ts with all 10 daily-journal components exported alphabetically.
